name: Operation Overlord
descriptionTemplate: Enemy units within a 3 hexes receive 35% additional damage, and disable the effects of sloped armor, protective device, provocation, abduction, and fighting alongside. After commanding ship units to eliminate an enemy, there is a X% chance to grant an additional attack.

progression.renderedDesc: Enemy units within a 3 hexes receive 35% additional damage, and disable the effects of sloped armor, protective device, provocation, abduction, and fighting alongside. After commanding ship units to eliminate an enemy, there is a 20% chance to grant an additional attack.
progression.renderedDescFr: Unités ennemies within a 3 hex receive 35% additional dégâts, and disable the effects of sloped blindage, protective device, provocation, abduction, and fighting alongside. After commanding unités navales to eliminate an ennemi, there is a 20% chance to grant an attaque supplémentaire.
